query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A figure stands in a natural outdoor setting with vegetation in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, almost entirely indistinct human figure dissolves into a soft mass of muted grays and greens, with no discernible facial features, clothing texture, or clear bodily contours, while the surrounding foliage similarly melts into unfocused color patches, creating an image where representational content nearly evaporates into pure tonal abstraction.
